raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Pazeeti jelle/ un waïdi
 tu Zianas Meita/ ka weena
Seewa/ kas dseinde. Jo nu tu
gan tseest no Pilefahta ahran/
un dshwofi Laukâ/ un nahksi
uhs Babeli/ bet tur tavst tu is-
glahbta/ tur tevi tas KUNGê
tspestihs no tavo Eenaidneeku
Rohkas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Nu irr gan dauds Pa-
gann prett tevi fapulzinati/ un
fakka: Lai winna tohp sagahni-
ta/ lai muhfas Azzis (Preeku)
reds pee Zianas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet tee ne finna ta KUN-
GA Dohmas/ un ne faproht
winna Padohmu/ ka wiꞥſch
tohs irr fakrahjts ka Kuhtischus
Peedarbâ.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Zellees/ un kull tu Zianas
Meita/ jo es darrifchu tawu
Raggu par Dselst/ un tawus
Naggus warraizus/un tu fakulsi
dauds Tautas/ tad tsdeldefchu
es winnu Sagahdu tam KUN-
GAM var Gohdu/ un winno
Padohmu tam Kungam wiffas
Gemmes.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Nu tad/ tu Karra Meita/
fapulzejees/ wiꞥſch apmettitees
prett mums: Tee fittibs to Soh-
Gi eekfh Israëka ar Rihkstes
Waigâ.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "N tu Betlette Eetwa-
fta/ jepſchn tu masa effi
starp teem tuhkfsto+cheem
no Juhda/ no tevis isees man/
kas Waldneeks buhs eekfh I-
sraëka/ un kurrâ Jégahjumi no
Eetahkuma/ no muhschigahm
Deenahm irr.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tadeht nodohs wiꞥſch
tehs lihds taim Laikam/ teekams
ta/ kurrai buhs dseindeht/ dseun-
dehs. Tad atgreesifjees winna
atlikschi Brahti ar teem I-
sraëka Behrneem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un wiꞥſch stahwehs un
gannihs eekfh ta KUNG A
Spehka/ eekfh ta Augstunia ta
KUNGA fawa Deewa Wahr-
da. Un tee dshwohs/ jo nu
taps wiꞥſch leels lihds teem Pa-
faules Galleem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un fchis buhs tas Meers/
kad Affurs muhſâ Semmê
nahks/ un kad wiꞥſch muhsfs
skatitês Nammôs ee-ees. Tad
mehs eezelfsim prett winan fep-
tirris Gannus/ un astonus
Wirfneekus no teem Zilwekeem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tee nogannihs Affura
Semmi ar Sohbina/ un Nim-
roda Semnt ar winnas tswil-
teem Sohbineein. Ta isglahbs
wiꞥſch muhs no Affura/ kad
tas muhſâ Semmê nahks/ un
kad tas muhsfs Robbeschâs ee-
ees.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un kas no Jehkaba atlifs/
tas buhs starp dauds Laudim
ka weena Raſta no ta KUNG A/
ka Lahfas us to Sahli/ kas us
fff
newee-
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
